a.xlink:title: Registers a maneuver type with a maneuver server.

UUID getter.

Finds a maneuver from UUID.

Registers a maneuver with the maneuver scheduler. To be called from a maneuver server....

Getter for the termianted flag.
Updates a maneuver in the queue. Replace the first occurrence of the maneuver.
Finds a maneuver in the queue by its UUID.
Is master.
Cancels all pending maneuvers.

Returns whether a given maneuver can immediately execute.
Returns whether a given maneuver can execute later.
Pushes an item to the queue.
Getter for the combined drone awareness simple type by copy.
Evaluates whether a maneuver can be executed given an awareness.

Whether the queue is empty.
